item.title: 「hololive 7th fes. Ridin' on Dreams」全4公演のライブ映像をJOY…
ホロライブプロダクションの二次創作ブランド「holo Indie」が、ストラテジーゲーム『KING …
秘密結社holoX × GiGOキャンペーン開催のお知らせ
[hololive] Celebrating a new song release! Let’s go on a journey packed with various goods and digital content set in Osaka! You...
Friday, April 3, 2026 at 3:37 AM EDT
Maximizing Experiences While Supporting Talents’ Emotions: Interview with the Live Production Division
item.author: COVER_iwasaki
item.content:encoded: I feel like this was particularly evident in the setlist and production. With the setlist, we told a story by having the songs in order from earliest releases to her latest tracks.When representing AZKi’s seven-year journey, we displayed each of α, β and γ with decorations up above so that each one was easily distinguishable. This showed the important elements, or routes, within her activities, which are very familiar to all (pioneers―the name for AZKi’s fans). We represented the struggles AZKi is carrying by choosing songs that symbolize each route and showing off AZKi’s current form.However, if it just ends with that, then it will just appear like a simple goodbye or she is disappearing, potentially leaving people with a sad impression. The visual effects we went for was having past AZKi represented as beams of light blending into the stage and then we gradually had flowers blossom across the stage, with the aim of symbolizing the growth process for her as a solo artist.Then to add to that, we decided early on to have violins playing as well. Through this kind of production, we were able to create a live experience like no other, by bringing out a new layer to her past songs as well. This was probably the first time violins were used at a hololive production live event as well.

item.author: jun3720
item.content:encoded: AZKiが2019年にリリースした1st Album『without U』CDがファン待望の復刻！BiS/BiSH 等のサウンドプロデュースを手掛けるSCRAMBLESのほか、若手トラックメイカー、同人・ボカロカルチャーの人気作家が参加。幅広いシーンを横断的につなぐ楽曲ラインナップで、AZKi の幅広さを1枚にー集約したアルバム。※本商品はQACW-3012 / QACW-3013AZKi『without U』[TypeA][TypeB] のパッケージデザインを一部変更、リマスタリングを施した復刻盤となります。

item.title: 【予約受付中】AZKi Re:Creating world (復刻盤)：26年7月1日発売
item.author: jun3720
item.content:encoded: AZKiが2020年にリリースした2nd Album『Re:Creating world』CD がファン待望の復刻！つらいことや悲しいことがあっても何度でも世界を創り直すという決意と、次の世界でステージに立つ誰かのためへの継承を込めた、文字通り再創造的アルバムが完成！※本商品はINNK-0005・AZKi『Re:Creating world』のパッケージデザインを一部変更、リマスタリングを施した復刻盤となります。※オリジナル版のDLC 特典は現在ご利用いただけません。「Overture」「Creating world 2020ver.」「青い夢 アコースティックver.」はCD内にボーナストラックとして収録しています。

Bringing Talents’ Emotions to Life Through Music: AZKi on Creating Her EPs and Solo Live
item.author: COVER_iwasaki
item.content:encoded: I did. This is why I ended up having the six-song medley at the beginning (laughs). Those songs are where AZKi started, so I really wanted to sing them. But if I had sung all of them in full, the concert would have gone over time, so we decided to make it a medley. It turned into quite an intense way to start, but I think I was able to put a lot of emotion into it.From the perspective of a “new departure,” I think the two new songs are symbolic. The first, “Going My Way,” is a song we created as the unit “AS_tar” with guest Hoshimachi Suisei. As I mentioned in the second interview, Suisei and I share a history together as part of the INoNaKa family, so I loved being able to sing a new song looking to the future with her as the new unit “AS_tar.”The other song, “Farewell,” was written specifically for this live concert. As I repeatedly thought about what I wanted to convey through this solo live, I felt that rather than putting it into words, I wanted to convey it through my music, so although it made for tight scheduling, we managed to make it happen.

item.title: Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 “Monopoly” Photo Contest Results
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Tourism Agency!The photo contest for the event “Aki Rosenthal Birthday 2026 Encore in Holoearth,” held on Friday, March 13, 2026 in Holoearth, has concluded, and here are the results!A huge thanks to all participants for the many wonderful submissions! Everyone’s support for AkiRose, the excitement of the event, and your passion for your oshi moved all of us on the Holoearth Tourism Agency staff.After a careful and thorough review, we are pleased to present the winning entries that truly stood out!Please continue reading to see the selection! Awarded for a shot that overflows with “oshikatsu” passion and captures a moment that moves the viewer! Awarded for a shot that captures the very moment that makes you think, “This is ‘Monopoly’!” Awarded for a shot rich in expressive creativity and inventive techniques, full of surprising elements!・Holoearth Tourism Agency Selection A special award given to a standout shot selected by the head of the Tourism Agency!The photos are also on display on Focal Square billboards, so be sure to check them out!Taking on the theme of ‘cool beauty,’ we were moved by the passion behind capturing such a fitting shot!The subtitles, stage effects, and AkiRose’s expression all come together for a perfect shot that truly represents the event!A wonderful shot that expresses the bond between AkiRose and the Rose Knights! The little Rose Knights are adorable!Holoearth Tourism Agency SelectionThe wonderful composition and that eyes-half-closed expression earned high praise from the team! The mischievous AkiRose is lovely here!Winners will receive 3,000 HoloCoin (Regular) at a later date! Every submission was filled with love for AkiRose, and the judges had a great time, although selecting winners was no easy task. Thank you to everyone for the many entries!

item.title: Ver. 1.4.0.0: New Area, Simulation Room Updates Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!Holoearth will be updated to Ver. 1.4.0.0 on Tuesday, March 24, 2026 after maintenance. (Schedule is subject to change.)New Area: Walled City of VestaAbout The Walled City of Vesta A city centered around a massive circular ruin, with walls that protect it from outside threats. It boasts strong military power with knight orders and an adventurers guild, with a flourishing culture including cuisine and the arts.The new area, Walled City of Vesta, is a cultural city with a majestic atmosphere. It also appears in the animation promotional video titled “Now, Discover Your Other World,” so you can recreate scenes from the video and take photos.Commemorative Area Release Gifts To commemorate the opening of Vesta, we will be giving away items. After maintenance ends they will be delivered to the Gift Box in the HoloPhone (H key). ・Cafe DrinkSimulation Room Improvements & Over 90 New Furniture Items!The Simulation Room will receive a major update with various quality-of-life improvements. In addition to balance adjustments, new re-playable elements and additional furniture sets such as “holo no graffiti” will be introduced. Please enjoy the new adventures and crafting.Balance Adjustments & New ItemsThe following balance adjustments will be made:・Removing loss of items and observation data when incapacitated ・Increased walk and sprint movement speed ・Increased initial carrying capacity from 100 to 300 ・Increased acquisition amount for certain materials ・Increased initial stamina from 50 to 75 ・More rare variant spawns for some monsters ・More holo Incentives for daily quest rewardsSpawned bosses will be added.・Huge Toxic Slime ・Horned BullDefeating all three bosses, including the current Golem boss, will drop materials that can be used to craft the new Jabberwock Statue item. Create the related C2 Spawner items via Projection at a ProtectCube and use the item to spawn its boss.Crafted Items Available in Other AreasThe following equipment, when crafted, will be available for use outside of the Simulation Room・Explorer’s Beret (Blu / Red / Gn) ・Explorer’s Tunic (Blu / Red / Gn) ・Explorer’s Boots (Bn / Gry / Blk) ・Golem Helm ・Golem GreavesOver 90 New Furniture Items!What is “holo no graffiti” “hologra” is a weekly short animation featuring talents of the VTuber group hololive production. These items can also be used in My Room and My Shop. It will be possible to craft these items starting from ProtectCube Lv. 2 via Projection.・Office Foundation ・Office Wall ・Office Doorframe ・Office Entrance Doorframe ・Office Floor/Ceiling ・Office Horizontal Shelf ・Office Cabinet ・Office Desk Space ・Office Kitchen ・Office Light ・Office Low Table ・Office Partition ・Office Sofa (Gn) ・Office TV ・Office Mounted Whiteboard ・Office Whiteboard ・Office Model Ship ・Office Tapioca Picture Frame ・Office Moai Statue ・Office Tissue Box ・Office Paper Bag ・Office Fire Extinguisher ・Office Watermelon ・Office Aluminum Can ・Office Megaphone ・Office Dictionary ・Office Cyber Driving School Sign ・Office Insecticide・White Wall ・White Floor/Ceiling ・White Doorframe ・White Wood-Grain Floor/Ceiling ・White Wood-Grain Foundation ・Simple Curtains (Wh) ・Simple Rolling Cabinet (Wh) ・Simple Headphones (Wh) ・Simple Air Conditioner (Wh) ・Simple Mounted Headphones ・Wooden Acoustic Panel ・Room Fragrance ・STREAMER GIRLY Fridge ・STREAMER GIRLY Gaming Chair ・STREAMER GIRLY PC Tower ・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Keyboard ・STREAMER GIRLY Mic ・STREAMER GIRLY Digital Clock ・STREAMER GIRLY Star Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Honeycomb Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Trash Can ・STREAMER GIRLY Neon Sign ・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Rack ・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Mat Set ・STREAMER GIRLY Audio Interface ・STREAMER GIRLY Mini Monitor ・STREAMER GIRLY Macro Pad ・STREAMER GIRLY Monitor & Cam ・STREAMER GIRLY Desk Set ・STREAMER GIRLY Room Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Cactus Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Moon Light ・STREAMER GIRLY Tabletop Frame ・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Frame ・STREAMER GIRLY Mounted Shelf ・Jabberwock Statue ・C2 Spawner (Horned Bull)Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach ReopenDue to popular demand, the Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach areas will reopen. Kyo-no-Miyako has been changed to later in the day for enjoying the cherry blossoms at night, offering a different atmosphere from before, and Celestial Beach has had part of its layout changed.Commemorative Items & Gestures for Area Re-OpeningsAlso, to celebrate the reopening of Kyo-no-Miyako and Celestial Beach, we will be giving away items and a gesture. After maintenance ends, gift items will be delivered to the Gift Box in the HoloPhone menu (H key).Enjoy using the “Kanpai” and “Water Gun” gestures together! ・Holoearth Original Drink ・Gesture (Omairi) Note: the “Omairi” gesture is the same as the one previously released. March 24, 2026 (Tue) after maintenance. ・GAMING GIRLY Gaming Outfit ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Haori (DkGry / DkRed / Gn) ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Chihaya (WhCr / DkGryCyn / YelPr) ・Sticker T Isaki Riona (Blk / Wh ・Sticker T Koganei Niko (Blk / Wh ・Sticker T Mizumiya Su (Blk / Wh ・Sticker T Rindo Chihaya (Blk / Wh ・Sticker T Kikirara Vivi (Blk / Wh ・GAMING GIRLY Rib Knit Underwear ・Simple Cute Long Boxers ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Riding Hakama (Gry / Blk / Vlt) ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Andon Hakama (Cr / Cyn / Vlt) ・GAMING GIRLY Hex Print Leggings ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Tabi (Wh / DkRed / Blk) ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Tabi (Wh / DkGry / Yel) ・GAMING GIRLY High Top Sneakers ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Kumiko Zori (Cr / Wh / Yel) ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Zori (Cr / LtBlu / OWh) ・GAMING GIRLY Cat Ear Headset ・Daybreak Eyes ・Blue Fox Eyes ・Metallic Aurora ・Pink Pop Eyes ・Big Hoop Earrings (RedGld / Gld / Slv) ・Small Square Earrings (RedGld / Gld / Slv) ・Square Earrings (RedGld / Gld / Slv) ・GAMING GIRLY Gaming Hairpin Set ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Temari Pin (WhCr / CrLtCyn / PrWh) ・Gofukuya Tsubaki Nishiki Hair Tie (WhCr / CynOch / PrWh) ・Yamato Ears (Bg / DkGry / Or) ・Summer Splash Party Ver. 2025年ホロライブのスーパーチャットはどう変化したか 前年比約4.5億円の減少
item.content:encoded: 大手VTuberグループ・ホロライブプロダクションを運営するカバー株式会社の分析を筆者が行う中で、2025年スーパーチャット収益の概算額を纏めたデータを公開させていただきたいと思います。 ファンの皆さまにも差し支えの無い範囲で参考程度にお楽しみいただければ幸いです。続きをみる
